resources.string: Next alarm not earlier than in %1$s

A separate siren volume level, independent of the device's overall volume:

• 0% is silent mode.
• 100% is maximum volume.

When enabled, keyword checks and alarms apply only inside the selected time range (device local time). Outside that window, matching is skipped and no alarm is triggered; relevant events may still appear in the log as skipped.

Example: set start to 22:00 and end to 07:00 — Vartovyi will be active only at night and will stop automatically during the day, without any action from you.

When disabled, monitoring runs around the clock.
Monitoring will be active from %1$s to %2$s
Monitoring is active all the time

Maximum number of log entries stored on the device. When a new entry is saved and the count would exceed this limit, the oldest entries are removed. Changing the limit alone does not delete entries immediately; trimming runs the next time an entry is added.

After an alarm fires, repeated alarms are blocked for the selected duration. Messages with trigger words during the cooldown are still recorded in the log — the siren just won\'t fire.\n\nThis prevents duplicate signals when a channel sends multiple messages about the same target in quick succession.

All app settings will return to factory defaults (sound, schedule, log limits, cooldowns). Monitoring will be turned off.

Keywords, stop words, Telegram channels, and channel filters will be cleared.

The event log will be erased.

Your acceptance of Privacy Policy and Terms of Use stays saved — you will not be asked to consent again.

This cannot be undone.
Settings were reset to factory defaults
This is a test alarm notification.
Grant required permissions before activating monitoring
To continue, review Privacy Policy and Terms of Use. By tapping Confirm, you acknowledge that you have read and accepted these documents.
This app is not a replacement for official air raid alert systems, including the official «Тривога» app. Always follow official warnings and guidance from civil defense authorities.
Notification access was revoked — monitoring disabled
Clears the entered text in this field
A message won\'t trigger an alarm if it contains any stop word.\n\nLetter case is ignored (uppercase/lowercase does not affect matching).
Only messages from these channels will trigger the alarm

Enter the channel name exactly as it appears in your Telegram chat list.

Emoji at the beginning or end of the name are not required — you can omit them and type only the text. For example, for «🚨 Air Alert Kyiv» type «Air Alert Kyiv».

Matching is case-insensitive.
The item "%s" will be removed from the list.
Keyword must start with a letter or digit

plurals.name: keywords_term_too_short
plurals.item: Each word must be at least %d character
Each word must be at least %d characters

resources.string: Default keywords will be added to your list without removing existing entries. Duplicates will be skipped.
All default keywords are already in the list
Grant all required permissions for stable background monitoring
Disable optimization so app can run reliably in background
Allows alarm to bypass silent and DND mode
Allows showing alarm notifications on Android 13+
Allows opening full-screen alarm on lock screen
Captured Telegram notifications will appear here
This removes all saved log entries from this device. Use this when you want to reset history or remove sensitive notification data.

All Telegram notifications received while monitoring is active are shown here.

Entry statuses:
• Alarm — a trigger word matched and the siren fired.
• Skipped (cooldown) — a trigger word matched, but the delay between alarms (configured in app settings) has not elapsed yet.
• Skipped — no trigger match.

To copy a channel name or message text, tap the corresponding action buttons on the right.

All trigger keywords, stop words, and Telegram channel lists will be removed. Channel filtering will be turned off.

If an alarm is playing, it will stop. Monitoring will be turned off.

This cannot be undone.
All your existing trigger keywords, stop words, and Telegram channels will be permanently deleted and replaced by the contents of the imported file.\n\nThis cannot be undone.
Export failed: could not write the file
Import failed: the file is corrupted or has wrong format
Import failed: backup version %1$d is not supported
Import failed: unable to save data
Import failed: file is too large (max 2 MB)

Vartovyi works together with Telegram. In the background it reads notifications from Telegram channels and searches them for your keywords.

The moment a match is found in a notification — the app immediately triggers a loud siren, even if your phone is on silent.

Set up once — protected always.

The most important setting is keywords. They define what counts as danger for you. Without them, Vartovyi won't know what to react to.
🔒 All your data is stored only on your device. Nothing is sent to any servers or third-party services — your privacy is fully protected.

If you don\'t have Telegram installed yet — download it from Google Play. The official Telegram, Telegram X, and NekoX are all supported.\n\nFind an alert channel for your city or region and subscribe to it. That\'s where Vartovyi will receive notifications to analyze.

⚠️ After subscribing, make sure to enable notifications for the channel — without them Telegram won\'t deliver any notifications, and Vartovyi won\'t receive any messages.\n\nOpen channel settings → «Notify» → choose «With sound» or «Without sound». We recommend without sound: the siren will be triggered by Vartovyi itself.

Required — the app won't work without these:
• Notification listener access
• Show own notifications
• Unrestricted background work (battery)

Recommended — for full protection:
• Do Not Disturb access
• Full-screen notifications

A detailed description of each permission is available on the Permissions screen inside the app.

Keywords are the core setting — they determine when the siren triggers.

Trigger words — a message containing these words will trigger the alarm. Three modes: Word, All Words, Phrase.

Stop words — if found in a message, the alarm won't fire even if a trigger matches.

Channel filter — optional. Restricts monitoring to selected Telegram channels only.

💬 Channels may post in Ukrainian or Russian. If you follow Russian-language ones, add Russian variants of your trigger words separately (e.g. «Київ» and «Киев»).

💡 Tip: after the first message arrives, open the Logs screen and copy words directly from there.
You can set it up now or do it later in the app.

ℹ️ You don't have to do this step right now. It's reference information in case Vartovyi starts behaving unreliably — for example, doesn't respond after a phone reboot, the alarm screen doesn't appear, or notifications arrive with a delay. If everything works as expected — feel free to skip this step and come back to it later via the «Info» section on the Settings screen.

Some manufacturers add extra background restrictions on top of standard Android permissions. In that case, check the settings below for your device.

Xiaomi · POCO · Redmi (MIUI)
• Autostart — Settings → Apps → Manage apps → Vartovyi → Permissions → Autostart → enable
• Pop-up windows — Settings → Apps → Vartovyi → Other permissions → Display pop-up windows while running in background → enable

Xiaomi · POCO · Redmi (HyperOS)
• Autostart — Settings → Apps → Manage apps → Vartovyi → Background autostart → enable
• Pop-up windows — Settings → Apps → Vartovyi → Other permissions → Display pop-up windows while running in background → enable

Samsung (One UI)
• Settings → Battery and device care → Battery → Background usage limits → Never sleeping apps → add Vartovyi
• If Vartovyi is not in the list — that's fine. It means Samsung hasn't flagged it for sleeping yet. The app is already protected if Battery optimization is disabled.

OPPO · OnePlus · Realme (ColorOS / OxygenOS / Realme UI)
• Startup Manager — Phone Manager → Startup Manager → enable Vartovyi
• Battery — Settings → Battery → App Battery Saver → Vartovyi → don't restrict

Huawei · Honor (EMUI / HarmonyOS)
• App launch — Settings → Battery → App launch → Vartovyi → manage manually → enable Auto-launch, Secondary launch, Run in background

Vivo (FuntouchOS / OriginOS)
• Settings → Battery → High background power consumption → enable Vartovyi

Other brands
If the app still doesn't work reliably in the background — search for "autostart" or "background activity" in your device Settings and allow Vartovyi.

💡 These lists only show apps that the system considers at risk. If your app isn't listed — it's working fine and no action is needed.

Tap the Activate button on the home screen — the shield will light up and Vartovyi will start monitoring incoming Telegram notifications in the background.

To make sure everything is set up correctly, we recommend running a quick test right away:
• Ask someone to send a message containing your keyword in Telegram.
• If you have a channel with notifications enabled — send it there. If not — any Telegram chat with active notifications will work.

If the siren didn't fire — open the Logs screen and check whether an event appeared. That will help you understand what went wrong.

All set. Stay safe. 🛡

You can always revisit this guide later in the Info section of the Settings screen.
